nasb.text: I went about as though it were my friend or brother; I bowed down mourning, as one who sorrows for a mother.

esv.text: I went about as though I grieved for my friend or my brother; as one who laments his mother, I bowed down in mourning.

cnv.text: 我往來奔走，看他們像自己的朋友兄弟； 我哀痛屈身，如同哀悼母親。

ccb.text: 我为他们哀伤， 视他们为朋友、弟兄； 我低头为他们哭泣， 如同哀悼自己的母亲。

csbs.text: 我往来奔走，像为我的朋友、弟兄； 我哀痛、沮丧，像为母亲悲哀。
